persona: P7 繁体中文台湾 (Traditional Chinese, Taiwan vocab)
verdict_basis: Both independent sessions terminated at turn 3 (after T2 anchor answer) with termination_reason='user_input_unparseable_no_spec' and spec_capsule_cid=null. Matches the FAIL criterion 'predicate_double_fail' and 'triage misclassifies as gibberish'. Reproducible (2/2 runs).

user_term_to_system_echo.繁體中文: 繁体中文 (Simplified script form of the same words)

regional_vocab_loss.summary: Q1 echoes silently normalize ALL Traditional terms and Taiwan vocab to Simplified mainland equivalents. The model recognized semantic content but did not preserve regional variant.

critical_metrics.lang_predicate_violations: unknown — no telemetry endpoint exposed; HTTP returns 200 OK with lang=zh accepted on all turns, so P6 lang predicate did not reject Traditional as non-zh. Failure is downstream of language gate.
critical_metrics.slot_coverage_at_termination: 1/7 (only 'job') in run1; 1/7 in run2 (job, then reset to 0)
critical_metrics.anchor_slot_capture_attempt: T2 (錨點=SHA256+原檔名) was the trigger — engine returned identical Q2 with empty slot arrays on first retry, then terminated on next turn
critical_metrics.narrative: Backend accepts Traditional Chinese input (HTTP 200, lang=zh) and the model semantically understands T1 (it correctly identifies video transcoding, MP4 output, GCP Tokyo). However: (a) every system-generated question silently normalizes Traditional Chinese and Taiwan regional vocab into Simplified Chinese mainland equivalents (影片→视频, 伺服器→服务器, 拖曳→拖拽, 繁體中文→繁体中文, 東京區→东京区) — this is a script + regional-vocab fidelity failure visible on Q1; (b) the T2 anchor answer (containing Taiwan-specific terms 錨點/檔案/轉檔/檔) triggers a parser/triage failure: the engine echoes the same Q2 with confidence=0 and empty covered_slots/open_slots on the first parse, then on the next turn terminates with termination_reason='user_input_unparseable_no_spec' and spec_capsule_cid=null. The pattern is reproducible across two independent sessions. This is predicate_double_fail behavior: T2 is silently rejected once, T3 is silently rejected, termination triggers without producing any spec capsule. Net effect: a Taiwan user typing natural Traditional Chinese with Taiwan vocab cannot complete a single driven-grill session — they get terminated 2 turns in. Even if they had completed, the spec would be silently rewritten in Simplified mainland Chinese.
